special_mechanics.name: Dodge/Evasion
special_mechanics.description: Little Mac can dodge left or right to evade opponent attacks

special_mechanics.name: Duck
special_mechanics.description: Little Mac can duck to avoid high punches

special_mechanics.name: Block
special_mechanics.description: Little Mac can block punches by putting up his guard

special_mechanics.name: Counter-Punching
special_mechanics.description: Punching the opponent directly before or after certain attacks launches earns a star (max 3 stars)

physics_values.star_loss_condition: lost when Mac is hit or knocked down

special_mechanics.name: Uppercut
special_mechanics.description: Powerful uppercut attack that requires a star to execute

special_mechanics.name: Knockdown System
special_mechanics.description: Opponent or player can be knocked down; 10-second recovery window. Third knockdown in one round = TKO. Fourth knockdown = match loss

special_mechanics.name: Heart/Stamina System
special_mechanics.description: Heart counter decreases when hit, blocking punches, or throwing dodged/blocked punches. At zero hearts, Little Mac becomes exhausted and cannot attack

tier_notes: Tier 2: No quantitative physics parameters documented in Wikipedia source. Game is a boxing game with defensive mechanics and pattern-recognition gameplay rather than traditional platformer physics. Movement parameters (walk speed, jump physics, gravity) are not applicable to this boxing game paradigm.
